title: Escaped Identifiers should conform to IEEE 1800

features.name: escaped_identifier_in_port_declaration
features.description: Code should include an escaped identifier (starting with backslash) used as an output port declaration

features.name: escaped_identifier_in_procedural_assignment
features.description: Code should include an escaped identifier being assigned in a sequential always block with non-blocking assignment

features.name: underscore_prefixed_identifier_as_port
features.description: Code should include a regular identifier starting with underscore used as an input port

features.name: escaped_identifier_with_special_characters
features.description: Code should include an escaped identifier containing special characters (exclamation marks) used as a signal
